name: Generation Golf Lounge & Bar
address: 288 N Santa Anita Ave #1, Arcadia, CA 91006
about: Generation Golf (GENG) is a high-end indoor golf simulator facility and bar located in Arcadia, CA. It offers entertainment through high-definition full-swing simulation golf, complemented by food, beverages, golf merchandise, and an upscale lounge environment. The facility is designed for a premium experience, featuring advanced golf technology and a social atmosphere for both casual play and serious practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced GCQuad simulator technology with HD screens and precise ball tracking
Upscale bar and lounge environment with a wide selection of beers, wines, and cocktails
1-on-1 professional coaching and equipment fitting services using tour-proven launch monitors

food_and_drink.notes: Culinary delights and food options are available to complement the golf experience.
Full bar with a wide range of beers, wines, sake, soju, refreshing draft options, and signature cocktails.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced indoor simulator with precise ball tracking and HD screens.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or the facility provides equipment for use during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Beverages are available for purchase separately at the on-site bar. Outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 1-hour session is available, which is typically sufficient for 9 holes or a focused practice session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families and kids, offering a welcoming environment for all skill levels.
